issues.description: Condition missing 'LeaderHasType' check for multicolored requirement. Text states 'If your Leader is multicolored' but DSL uses 'Always'.
SearchDeck action incomplete. Must specify: look at 3 cards, add up to 1 to hand, place rest at top or bottom in any order. Current DSL does not capture the 'look at 3' and 'place rest' mechanics.

actions.note: Look at 3 cards from top; add up to 1 to hand; place rest at top or bottom of deck in any order
